import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(b)
          if is_ws(b)
            i = i + 1
          else
            skipping = false
          end
        when None
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if b == 43
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      mut value = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(b)
            if b >= 48 and b <= 57
              value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
              i = i + 1
            else
              reading = false
            end
          when None
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, value * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result = []
  mut going = true
  while going
    let n = remaining.len()
    if n == 0
      going = false
    else
      mut max_val = 0
      mut max_idx = 0
      mut i = 0
      while i < n
        match remaining.get(i)
        when Some(v)
          if i == 0 or v > max_val
            max_val = v
            max_idx = i
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      result = list.push(result, max_val)
      mut new_remaining = []
      mut j = 0
      while j < n
        if j != max_idx
          match remaining.get(j)
          when Some(v)
            new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      remaining = new_remaining
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
let total = sorted.len()
let take = if k > total
  total
else
  k
end

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
while idx < take
  match sorted.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    if idx == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
